29509.title: Headstrong Girls and Dependent Boys: Gender Differences in the Labor Market Returns to Child Behavior
29509.zh_title: 倔强的女孩和依赖的男孩：儿童行为劳动力市场回报的性别差异
29509.abstract: The authors use data from the Children of the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth (C-NLSY79) to examine gender differences in the associations between child behavioral problems and early adult earnings. They find large and significant earnings penalties for women who exhibited more headstrong behavior and for men who exhibited more dependent behavior as children. In contrast, there are no penalties for men who were headstrong or for women who were dependent. While other child behavioral problems are also associated with labor market earnings, their associations are not significantly different by gender. The gender differences in headstrong and dependent behavior are not explained by education, marriage, depression, self-esteem, health, or adult personality traits. However, one potential explanation is that these gender differences are a consequence of deviations from gender norms and stereotypes in the workplace.
29509.zh_abstract: 作者使用全国青年纵向调查儿童数据（C-NLSY79）来检验儿童行为问题与早期成年收入之间关联的性别差异。他们发现，对于童年时期表现出更多倔强行为的女性以及表现出更多依赖行为的男性，存在巨大且显著的收入惩罚。相比之下，对于倔强的男性或依赖的女性则没有惩罚。虽然其他儿童行为问题也与劳动力市场收入相关，但其关联在性别上没有显著差异。倔强和依赖行为的性别差异无法通过教育、婚姻、抑郁、自尊、健康或成人人格特征来解释。然而，一个可能的解释是，这些性别差异是职场中偏离性别规范和刻板印象的结果。

29508.title: Organizational Structure and Pricing: Evidence from a Large U.S. Airline
29508.zh_title: 组织结构和定价：来自一家美国大型航空公司的证据
29508.authors: Ali Hortaçsu, Olivia R. Natan, Hayden Parsley, Timothy Schwieg, Kevin R. Williams
29508.abstract: Firms facing complex objectives often decompose the problems they face, delegating different parts of the decision to distinct sub-units. Using comprehensive data and internal models from a large U.S. airline, we establish that airline pricing is not well approximated by a model of the firm as a unitary decision-maker. We show that observed prices, however, can be rationalized by accounting for organizational structure and for the decisions by departments that are tasked with supplying inputs to the observed pricing heuristic. Simulating the prices the firm would charge if it were a rational, unitary decision-maker results in lower welfare than we estimate under observed practices. Finally, we discuss why counterfactual estimates of welfare and market power may be biased if prices are set through decomposition, but we instead assume that they are set by unitary decision-makers.
29508.zh_abstract: 面临复杂目标的企业通常会将面临的问题分解，将决策的不同部分委托给不同的子单元。利用一家美国大型航空公司的全面数据和内部模型，我们确定航空公司的定价不能很好地近似于一个作为统一决策者的企业模型。然而，我们表明，观察到的价格可以通过考虑组织结构以及负责为观察到的定价启发式提供投入的部门的决策来合理化。模拟如果企业是一个理性的、统一的决策者会收取的价格，得出的福利低于我们在观察到的做法下估计的福利。最后，我们讨论了如果价格是通过分解设定的，而我们却假设它们是由统一决策者设定的，那么反事实的福利和市场势力估计可能会产生偏差。
29508.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：C11, C53, D22, D42, L11, L93

29504.title: Technological Obsolescence
29504.abstract: This paper proposes a new measure of technological obsolescence using detailed patent data. Using this measure, we present two sets of results. First, firms' technological obsolescence foreshadows substantially lower growth, productivity, and reallocation of capital. This finding applies mainly for obsolescence of core innovation and embodied innovation, and it is stronger in competitive product markets. Second, in stock markets, high-obsolescence firms under-perform low-obsolescence firms by 7 percent annually. Using analyst forecast data, we show this is due to a systematic overestimation of future profits of obsolescent firms. The measure contains incremental information about firm innovation relative to measures focusing on new innovation.
29504.zh_abstract: 本文利用详细的专利数据提出了一种新的技术过时度量。使用这一度量，我们展示了两组结果。首先，企业的技术过时预示着显著更低的增长、生产率和资本再配置。这一发现主要适用于核心创新和体现型创新的过时，并且在竞争性产品市场中更为显著。其次，在股票市场中，高过时企业的年化表现比低过时企业低7%。利用分析师预测数据，我们表明这是由于系统性地高估了过时企业的未来利润。与关注新创新的度量相比，该度量包含了关于企业创新的增量信息。
29504.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：G1, G3, G4, O3, O4

29502.title: Buyouts: A Primer
29502.authors: Tim Jenkinson, Hyeik Kim, Michael S. Weisbach
29502.abstract: This paper provides an introduction to buyouts and the academic literature about them. Buyouts are initiated by “buyout funds”, which are limited partnerships raised from mostly institutional investors. The funds earn returns for their investors by improving the operations of the firms they acquire and exiting them for a profit. Buyout funds have grown substantially and currently raise more than $\$400$ billion annually in capital commitments. We first discuss the institutional environment that developed to foster such buyouts and to provide incentives for general partners and firm managers to earn returns for the fund’s investors. We then describe various strategies that funds use to increase the values of their portfolio companies. The paper provides up to date statistics on all aspects of the buyout industry. Finally, we present a summary of the academic literature on buyouts. This literature has paid particular attention to the extent to which buyouts earn risk-adjusted abnormal returns for their investors, as well as the sources of those returns.
29502.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了收购以及关于收购的学术文献。收购由“收购基金”发起，这些基金是主要从机构投资者筹集资金的有限合伙企业。这些基金通过改善所收购企业的运营并退出获利来为投资者赚取回报。收购基金已大幅增长，目前每年筹集超过4000亿美元的资本承诺。我们首先讨论了为促进此类收购而发展起来的制度环境，以及为普通合伙人和企业管理者提供激励以为基金投资者赚取回报的机制。然后，我们描述了基金用于增加其投资组合公司价值的各种策略。本文提供了关于收购行业各个方面的最新统计数据。最后，我们总结了关于收购的学术文献。这些文献特别关注收购在多大程度上为其投资者赚取了经风险调整的超额回报，以及这些回报的来源。

29501.title: Sovereign Risk and Financial Risk
29501.authors: Simon Gilchrist, Bin Wei, Vivian Z. Yue, Egon Zakrajšek
29501.abstract: In this paper, we study the interplay between sovereign risk and global financial risk. We show that a substantial portion of the comovement among sovereign spreads is accounted for by changes in global financial risk. We construct bond-level sovereign spreads for dollar-denominated bonds issued by over 50 countries from 1995 to 2020 and use various indicators to measure global financial risk. Through panel regressions and local projection analysis, we find that an increase in global financial risk causes a large and persistent widening of sovereign bond spreads. These effects are strongest when measuring global risk using the excess bond premium – a measure of the risk-bearing capacity of U.S. financial intermediaries. The spillover effects of global financial risk are more pronounced for speculative-grade sovereign bonds.
29501.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们研究了主权风险与全球金融风险之间的相互作用。我们表明，主权利差之间的共同变动中有很大一部分是由全球金融风险的变化解释的。我们构建了1995年至2020年50多个国家发行的美元计价债券的债券级主权利差，并使用各种指标来衡量全球金融风险。通过面板回归和局部投影分析，我们发现全球金融风险的上升会导致主权债券利差大幅且持续地扩大。当使用超额债券溢价（衡量美国金融中介风险承担能力的指标）来衡量全球风险时，这些影响最为强烈。全球金融风险的溢出效应对投机级主权债券更为显著。
29501.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, F33, G12

29527.title: The Cost of Consumer Collateral: Evidence from Bunching
29527.zh_title: 消费者抵押品的成本：来自聚集的证据
29527.authors: Benjamin L. Collier, Cameron Ellis, Benjamin J. Keys
29527.abstract: We show that borrowers are highly sensitive to the requirement of posting their homes as collateral. Using administrative loan application and performance data from the U.S. Federal Disaster Loan Program, we exploit a loan amount threshold above which households must post their residence as collateral. One-third of all borrowers select the maximum uncollateralized loan amount, and our bunching estimates suggest that the median borrower is willing to give up 40% of their loan amount to avoid collateral. Exploiting time variation in the loan amount threshold, we find that collateral causally reduces default rates by 35%. Our results help to explain high perceived default costs in the mortgage market, and uniquely quantify the extent to which collateral reduces moral hazard in consumer credit markets.
29527.zh_abstract: 我们表明，借款人对要求以房屋作为抵押品高度敏感。利用美国联邦灾害贷款项目的行政贷款申请和绩效数据，我们利用一个贷款金额阈值，超过该阈值家庭必须以其住宅作为抵押品。三分之一的借款人选择最大无抵押贷款金额，我们的聚集估计表明，中位数借款人愿意放弃其贷款金额的40%以避免抵押。利用贷款金额阈值的时间变化，我们发现抵押品因果性地将违约率降低了35%。我们的结果有助于解释抵押贷款市场中高感知违约成本，并独特地量化了抵押品在多大程度上减少了消费信贷市场中的道德风险。

29519.title: Finite- and Large-Sample Inference for Ranks using Multinomial Data with an Application to Ranking Political Parties
29519.zh_title: 基于多项数据对排名的有限样本和大样本推断：以政党排名为例
29519.authors: Sergei Bazylik, Magne Mogstad, Joseph P. Romano, Azeem Shaikh, Daniel Wilhelm
29519.abstract: It is common to rank different categories by means of preferences that are revealed through data on choices. A prominent example is the ranking of political candidates or parties using the estimated share of support each one receives in surveys or polls about political attitudes. Since these rankings are computed using estimates of the share of support rather than the true share of support, there may be considerable uncertainty concerning the true ranking of the political candidates or parties. In this paper, we consider the problem of accounting for such uncertainty by constructing confidence sets for the rank of each category. We consider both the problem of constructing marginal confidence sets for the rank of a particular category as well as simultaneous confidence sets for the ranks of all categories. A distinguishing feature of our analysis is that we exploit the multinomial structure of the data to develop confidence sets that are valid in finite samples. We additionally develop confidence sets using the bootstrap that are valid only approximately in large samples. We use our methodology to rank political parties in Australia using data from the 2019 Australian Election Survey. We find that our finite-sample confidence sets are informative across the entire ranking of political parties, even in Australian territories with few survey respondents and/or with parties that are chosen by only a small share of the survey respondents. In contrast, the bootstrap-based confidence sets may sometimes be considerably less informative. These findings motivate us to compare these methods in an empirically-driven simulation study, in which we conclude that our finite-sample confidence sets often perform better than their large-sample, bootstrap-based counterparts, especially in settings that resemble our empirical application.
29519.zh_abstract: 通过选择数据揭示的偏好来对不同类别进行排名是常见的做法。一个突出的例子是利用关于政治态度的调查或民调中估计的每个候选人或政党获得的支持份额来对政治候选人或政党进行排名。由于这些排名是基于支持份额的估计值而非真实值，因此政治候选人或政党的真实排名可能存在相当大的不确定性。在本文中，我们考虑通过为每个类别的排名构建置信集来解释这种不确定性的问题。我们既考虑为特定类别排名构建边际置信集的问题，也考虑为所有类别排名构建同时置信集的问题。我们分析的一个显著特征是，我们利用数据的多项结构来开发在有限样本中有效的置信集。此外，我们还使用自助法开发了仅在大样本中近似有效的置信集。我们使用2019年澳大利亚选举调查的数据，运用我们的方法对澳大利亚政党进行排名。我们发现，我们的有限样本置信集在整个政党排名中都具有信息量，即使在调查受访者较少和/或只有少数调查受访者选择的政党的澳大利亚领地也是如此。相比之下，基于自助法的置信集有时信息量要少得多。这些发现促使我们在一个经验驱动的模拟研究中比较这些方法，我们得出结论，我们的有限样本置信集通常优于其大样本、基于自助法的对应物，尤其是在类似于我们经验应用的环境中。
29519.meta: Programs：EFG, POL；JEL：C12, C14, D31, I20, J62

29518.title: Harvesting the Rain: The Adoption of Environmental Technologies in the Sahel
29518.zh_title: 收集雨水：萨赫勒地区环境技术的采用
29518.abstract: Many agricultural and environmental technologies require large upfront investments in exchange for longer-term benefits. This time profile of costs and benefits makes adoption particularly sensitive to liquidity and credit constraints, which are prevalent in low-income settings. We test the importance of these barriers to the adoption of an agricultural technique that helps reduce land degradation and restore soil fertility in Niger. We find little evidence that liquidity or credit constraints deter adoption: instead, providing farmers with training increases the share of adopters by over 90 percentage points, whereas adding conditional or unconditional cash transfers has no additional effect. Adoption increases agricultural output, reduces land turnover and leads to adoption spillovers up to three years after treatment. These results imply that training can be a cost-effective and scalable means of promoting the adoption of profitable technologies.
29518.zh_abstract: 许多农业和环境技术需要大量前期投资以换取长期收益。这种成本与收益的时间分布使得采用对流动性和信贷约束特别敏感，而这些约束在低收入环境中普遍存在。我们检验了这些障碍对尼日尔一项有助于减少土地退化和恢复土壤肥力的农业技术采用的重要性。我们几乎没有发现流动性或信贷约束阻碍采用的证据：相反，为农民提供培训使采用者的比例提高了超过90个百分点，而增加有条件或无条件现金转移则没有额外效果。采用提高了农业产出，减少了土地流转，并在处理后长达三年内导致采用溢出效应。这些结果表明，培训可以成为促进有利可图技术采用的一种成本效益高且可扩展的手段。

29550.title: Researchers' Degrees-of-Flexibility and the Credibility of Difference-in-Differences Estimates: Evidence From the Pandemic Policy Evaluations
29550.zh_title: 研究者的灵活度与双重差分估计的可信度：来自大流行政策评估的证据
29550.authors: Joakim A. Weill, Matthieu Stigler, Olivier Deschenes, Michael R. Springborn
29550.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic brought unprecedented policy responses and a large literature evaluating their impacts. This paper re-examines this literature and investigates the role of researchers' degrees-of-flexibility on the estimated effects of mobility-reducing policies on social-distancing behavior. We find that two-way fixed effects estimates are not robust to minor changes in usually-unexplored dimensions of the degree-of-flexibility space. While standard robustness tests based on the sequential addition of covariates are very stable, small changes in the outcome variable and its transformation lead to large and sometimes contradictory changes in the estimates, where the same policy can be found to significantly increase or decrease mobility. Yet, due to the large number of degrees-of-flexibility, one can focus on a set of results that appears stable, while ignoring problematic ones. We show that recently developed heterogeneity-robust difference-in-differences estimators only partially mitigate these issues, and discuss how a strategy of identifying the point at which a sequence of ever more-stringent robustness tests eventually fail could increase the credibility of policy evaluations.
29550.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行带来了前所未有的政策回应和大量评估其影响的文献。本文重新审视了这些文献，并研究了研究者的灵活度对减少流动性政策对社交距离行为估计效应的影响。我们发现，双向固定效应估计对通常未探索的灵活度空间维度的微小变化并不稳健。虽然基于依次添加协变量的标准稳健性检验非常稳定，但结果变量及其转换的微小变化会导致估计值发生巨大且有时相互矛盾的变化，其中同一项政策可能被发现显著增加或减少流动性。然而，由于存在大量的灵活度，人们可以专注于一组看似稳定的结果，而忽略有问题的结果。我们表明，最近开发的异质性稳健双重差分估计量只能部分缓解这些问题，并讨论了确定一系列日益严格的稳健性检验最终失败点的策略如何能够提高政策评估的可信度。
29550.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：C18, C23, H75, I12, I18

29548.title: Productivity and Pay in the US and Canada
29548.zh_title: 美国与加拿大的生产率与薪酬
29548.authors: Jacob Greenspon, Anna M. Stansbury, Lawrence H. Summers
29548.abstract: We study the productivity-pay relationship in the United States and Canada along two dimensions. The first is divergence: the degree to which the levels of productivity and pay have diverged. The second is delinkage: the degree to which incremental increases in the rate of productivity growth translate into incremental increases in the rate of growth of pay, holding all else equal. We show that in both countries the pay of typical workers has diverged substantially from average labor productivity over recent decades, driven by both rising labor income inequality and a declining labor share of income. Even as the levels of productivity and pay have grown further apart, we find evidence for some linkage between productivity and pay in both countries: a one percentage point increase in the rate of productivity growth is associated with a positive increase in the rate of pay growth, holding all else equal. This linkage appears stronger in the US than in Canada. Overall, our findings lead us to tentatively conclude that policies or trends which lead to incremental increases in productivity growth, particularly in large relatively closed economies like the USA, will tend to raise middle class incomes. At the same time, other factors orthogonal to productivity growth have been driving productivity and typical pay further apart, emphasizing that much of the evolution in middle class living standards will depend on measures bearing on relative incomes.
29548.zh_abstract: 我们从两个维度研究美国和加拿大的生产率与薪酬关系。第一个是背离：生产率和薪酬水平背离的程度。第二个是脱钩：在其他条件不变的情况下，生产率增长率每增加一个百分点，在多大程度上转化为薪酬增长率的增加。我们表明，在近几十年里，两个国家典型工人的薪酬与平均劳动生产率已大幅背离，这是由劳动收入不平等加剧和劳动收入份额下降共同驱动的。即使生产率和薪酬水平进一步拉大，我们发现在两个国家生产率和薪酬之间存在某种联系：在其他条件不变的情况下，生产率增长率每提高一个百分点，薪酬增长率就会随之正向增加。这种联系在美国似乎比在加拿大更强。总体而言，我们的发现使我们初步得出结论：导致生产率增长逐步提高的政策或趋势，特别是在像美国这样的大型相对封闭经济体中，往往会提高中产阶级收入。同时，与生产率增长正交的其他因素一直在推动生产率和典型薪酬进一步分离，这强调了中产阶级生活水平的许多演变将取决于影响相对收入的措施。

29547.title: The Incidence of the Corporate Income Tax is Irrelevant for its (Benefit-Based) Justification
29547.zh_title: 公司所得税的归宿与其（基于收益的）正当性无关
29547.authors: Simon M. Naitram, Matthew C. Weinzierl
29547.abstract: Robust support for corporate income taxation is a puzzle for standard tax theory because the tax’s incidence is uncertain and unreliable. We propose a resolution: if the corporate tax is seen as a benefit-based tax, its normative appeal depends on the correspondence between its incidence and that of the benefit which corporations derive from the state’s activities. We show that a simple mechanism makes this correspondence exact—and the net incidence of the tax zero—when the tax base matches what we call the benefit base. As a result, the appeal of the corporate income tax is independent of incidence as conventionally understood.
29547.zh_abstract: 对公司所得税的坚定支持对标准税收理论而言是一个谜题，因为该税的归宿不确定且不可靠。我们提出一种解决方案：如果将公司税视为一种基于收益的税，其规范性吸引力取决于该税的归宿与公司从国家活动中获得的收益的归宿之间的对应关系。我们证明，当税基与我们所谓的收益基础相匹配时，一个简单的机制能使这种对应关系精确成立——并且该税的净归宿为零。因此，公司所得税的吸引力独立于传统意义上的归宿。

29545.title: Did the Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program Reduce Readmissions? An Assessment of Prior Evidence and New Estimates
29545.zh_title: 医院再入院减少计划是否减少了再入院？对先前证据的评估与新估计
29545.abstract: In this article, we provide a comprehensive, empirical assessment of the hypothesis that the Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program (HRRP) affected hospital readmissions. In doing so, we provide evidence as to the validity of prior empirical approaches used to evaluate the HRRP and we present results from a previously unused approach to study this research question—a regression-kink design. Results of our analysis document that the empirical approaches used in most prior research assessing the efficacy of the HRRP often lack internal validity. Therefore, results from these studies may not be informative about the causal consequences of the HRRP. Results from our regression-kink analysis, which we validate, suggest that the HRRP had little effect on hospital readmissions. This finding contrasts with the results of most prior studies, which report that the HRRP significantly reduced readmissions. Our finding is consistent with conceptual considerations related to the assumptions underlying HRRP penalty; in particular, the difficulty of identifying preventable readmissions, the highly imperfect risk adjustment that affects the penalty determination and the absence of proven tools to reduce readmissions.
29545.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们对“医院再入院减少计划”（HRRP）影响医院再入院的假设进行了全面的实证评估。在此过程中，我们提供了关于先前用于评估HRRP的实证方法有效性的证据，并展示了一种此前未用于研究该问题的方法——回归扭结设计——的结果。我们的分析结果表明，大多数先前评估HRRP有效性的研究中所使用的实证方法通常缺乏内部有效性。因此，这些研究的结果可能无法揭示HRRP的因果后果。我们经过验证的回归扭结分析结果表明，HRRP对医院再入院几乎没有影响。这一发现与大多数先前研究的结果形成对比，这些研究报告称HRRP显著减少了再入院。我们的发现与关于HRRP处罚所依据假设的概念性考量相一致；特别是，识别可预防再入院的困难、影响处罚确定的高度不完善的风险调整，以及缺乏减少再入院的经证实的工具。

29544.title: Capital Return Jumps and Wealth Distribution
29544.zh_title: 资本回报跳跃与财富分配
29544.authors: Jess Benhabib, Wei Cui, Jianjun Miao
29544.abstract: The distributions of wealth in the US and many other countries are strikingly concentrated on the top and skewed to the right. To explain the income and wealth inequality, we provide a tractable heterogeneous-agent model with incomplete markets in continuous time. We separate illiquid capital assets from liquid bond assets and introduce capital return jump risks. Under recursive utility, we derive optimal consumption and wealth in closed form and show that the stationary wealth distribution has an exponential right tail. Our calibrated model can match the income and wealth distributions in the US data including the extreme right tail. We also study the effect of taxes on the distribution of wealth.
29544.zh_abstract: 美国及许多其他国家的财富分配在顶层高度集中且向右偏斜。为了解释收入与财富不平等，我们提供了一个具有不完全市场的连续时间可处理异质性主体模型。我们将非流动性资本资产与流动性债券资产分离，并引入资本回报跳跃风险。在递归效用下，我们推导出最优消费和财富的闭式解，并证明稳态财富分布具有指数右尾。我们校准后的模型能够匹配美国数据中的收入与财富分布，包括极右尾部分。我们还研究了税收对财富分配的影响。

29543.title: Social Interactions and Lottery Stock Mania
29543.zh_title: 社会互动与彩票股狂热
29543.authors: Turan G. Bali, David Hirshleifer, Lin Peng, Yi Tang, Qiguang Wang
29543.abstract: We find that social interactions are associated with stocks becoming more lottery-like and with greater investor overoptimism about the lottery characteristic. Heightened social media activity about a stock predicts extreme daily price run-ups—lottery events. Lottery event stocks subject to more extensive social media discussions subsequently experience greater retail buying pressure—particularly from Robinhood users—followed by lower returns. Moreover, lottery stocks of firms headquartered in more socially connected counties experience lower subsequent returns. Using staggered adoption of state-level social media privacy laws for identification, our findings support theories where social interactions incite investor excitement and asset price bubbles.
29543.zh_abstract: 我们发现，社会互动与股票变得更像彩票以及投资者对彩票特征的过度乐观相关。关于某只股票的社交媒体活动增加预示着极端的每日价格上涨——即彩票事件。经历更广泛社交媒体讨论的彩票事件股票随后会面临更大的散户买入压力——尤其是来自Robinhood用户的买入——随后回报率较低。此外，总部位于社交联系更紧密县的公司的彩票股随后回报率更低。利用州级社交媒体隐私法的交错采用进行识别，我们的发现支持了社会互动激发投资者兴奋情绪和资产价格泡沫的理论。
29543.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：D84, D91, G12, G14, G4, G41

29542.title: Unlocking the Benefits of Credit through Saving
29542.zh_title: 通过储蓄释放信贷的益处
29542.authors: Sanghamitra W. Mukherjee, Lauren F. Bergquist, Marshall Burke, Edward Miguel
29542.abstract: Access to microcredit has been shown to generate only modest average benefits for recipient households. We study whether other financial market frictions—in particular, lack of access to a safe place to save—might limit credit's benefits. Working with Kenyan farmers, we cross-randomize access to a simple savings product with a harvest-time loan. Among farmers offered a loan, the additional offer of a savings lockbox increased farm investment by 11% and household consumption by 7%. Results suggest that financial market frictions can interact in important ways and that multifaceted financial access programs might unlock dynamic household gains.
29542.zh_abstract: 已有研究表明，获得小额信贷对受助家庭仅产生适度的平均收益。我们研究其他金融市场摩擦——特别是缺乏安全储蓄渠道——是否可能限制信贷的益处。我们与肯尼亚农民合作，将获得简单储蓄产品的机会与收获期贷款进行交叉随机化。在获得贷款报价的农民中，额外提供储蓄保管箱使农业投资增加了11%，家庭消费增加了7%。结果表明，金融市场摩擦可能以重要方式相互作用，而多方面的金融准入计划可能释放动态的家庭收益。

29541.title: Gender Differences in Medical Evaluations: Evidence from Randomly Assigned Doctors
29541.zh_title: 医疗评估中的性别差异：来自随机分配医生的证据
29541.abstract: Little is known about what drives gender disparities in health care and related social insurance benefits. Using data and variation from the Texas workers’ compensation program, we study the impact of gender match between doctors and patients on medical evaluations and associated disability benefits. Compared to differences among their male patient counterparts, female patients randomly assigned a female doctor rather than a male doctor are 5.2% more likely to be evaluated as disabled and receive 8.6% more subsequent cash benefits on average. There is no analogous gender-match effect for male patients. Our estimates indicate that increasing the share of female patients evaluated by female doctors may substantially shrink gender gaps in medical evaluations and associated outcomes.
29541.zh_abstract: 关于是什么导致了医疗保健及相关社会保险福利中的性别差异，人们知之甚少。利用德克萨斯州工人赔偿计划的数据和变异，我们研究了医生与患者之间的性别匹配对医疗评估及相关残疾福利的影响。与男性患者之间的差异相比，被随机分配女医生而非男医生的女性患者被评估为残疾的可能性高出5.2%，并且平均获得多8.6%的后续现金福利。男性患者没有类似的性别匹配效应。我们的估计表明，增加由女医生评估的女性患者比例可能会大幅缩小医疗评估及相关结果中的性别差距。
29541.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I11, I14, J16

29540.title: Macroeconomic Dynamics with Rigid Wage Contracts
29540.zh_title: 刚性工资合同下的宏观经济动态
29540.authors: Tobias Broer, Karl Harmenberg, Per Krusell, Erik Öberg
29540.abstract: We adapt the wage contracting structure in Chari (1983) to a dynamic, balanced-growth setting with re-contracting à la Calvo (1983). The resulting wage-rigidity framework delivers a model very similar to that in Jaimovich and Rebelo (2009), with their habit parameter replaced by our probability of wage-contract resetting. That is, if wage contracts can be reset very frequently, labor supply behaves in accordance with King, Plosser, and Rebelo (1988) preferences, whereas if they are sticky for a long time, we obtain the setting in Greenwood, Hercowitz, and Huffman (1988), thus allowing significant responses of hours to wage changes.
29540.zh_abstract: 我们将Chari（1983）中的工资合同结构调整到具有Calvo（1983）式重新签约的动态平衡增长环境中。由此产生的工资刚性框架提供了一个与Jaimovich和Rebelo（2009）非常相似的模型，只是他们的习惯参数被我们的工资合同重置概率所取代。也就是说，如果工资合同可以非常频繁地重置，劳动力供给行为符合King、Plosser和Rebelo（1988）的偏好；而如果工资合同长期粘性，我们得到Greenwood、Hercowitz和Huffman（1988）中的设定，从而允许工时对工资变化做出显著反应。

29538.title: The Effects of Fiscal Decentralization on Publicly Provided Services and Labor Markets
29538.zh_title: 财政分权对公共服务和劳动力市场的影响
29538.authors: Nicola Bianchi, Michela Giorcelli, Enrica Maria Martino
29538.abstract: This paper studies how fiscal decentralization affects local services. It explores a 1993 reform that increased the fiscal autonomy of Italian municipalities by replacing government transfers with revenues from a local property tax. Our identifica- tion leverages cross-municipal variation in the degree of decentralization that stems from differences in the average age of buildings caused by bombings during WWII. Decentralization reduced local spending but expanded municipal services, such as nursery schools. These effects are larger in areas with greater political competition. The paper also investigates how the reform affected labor markets. Decentralization increased female labor supply—probably through expanded availability of nursery schools—thereby reducing the gender gap in employment.
29538.zh_abstract: 本文研究财政分权如何影响地方服务。它探讨了1993年的一项改革，该改革通过用地方财产税收入取代政府转移支付，增加了意大利城市的财政自主权。我们的识别利用了由二战期间轰炸导致的建筑物平均年龄差异所产生的跨城市分权程度变化。分权减少了地方支出，但扩大了市政服务，如幼儿园。这些影响在政治竞争更激烈的地区更大。本文还研究了改革如何影响劳动力市场。分权增加了女性劳动力供给——可能通过扩大幼儿园的可用性——从而缩小了就业中的性别差距。

29537.title: Reconstruction Aid, Public Infrastructure, and Economic Development: The Case of the Marshall Plan in Italy
29537.zh_title: 重建援助、公共基础设施与经济发展：以意大利马歇尔计划为例
29537.abstract: The Marshall Plan (1948–1952) was the largest aid transfer in history. This paper estimates its effects on Italy’s postwar economic development. It exploits differences between Italian provinces in the value of reconstruction grants they received. Provinces that could modernize more their infrastructure experienced higher increases in agricultural production, especially for perishable crops. In the same provinces, we observe larger investments in labor-saving machines, the entry of more firms into the industrial sector, and a larger expansion of the industrial and service workforce.
29537.zh_abstract: 马歇尔计划（1948-1952）是历史上规模最大的援助转移。本文估计了该计划对意大利战后经济发展的影响。研究利用了意大利各省在获得重建拨款金额上的差异。那些能够更大程度实现基础设施现代化的省份，其农业生产（尤其是易腐作物）增长更高。在同一批省份中，我们观察到对节省劳动力的机器投资更大，更多企业进入工业部门，以及工业和服务业劳动力规模更大幅度的扩张。

29536.title: The Effects of Becoming a Physician on Prescription Drug Use and Mental Health Treatment
29536.zh_title: 成为医生对处方药使用和心理健康治疗的影响
29536.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Ron Diris, Raymond Montizaan, Daniel I. Rees
29536.abstract: There is evidence that physicians disproportionately suffer from substance use disorder and mental health problems. It is not clear, however, whether these phenomena are causal. We use data on Dutch medical school applicants to examine the effects of becoming a physician on prescription drug use and the receipt of treatment from a mental health facility. Leveraging variation from lottery outcomes that determine admission into medical schools, we find that becoming a physician increases the use of antidepressants, opioids, anxiolytics, and sedatives, especially for female physicians. Among female applicants towards the bottom of the GPA distribution, becoming a physician increases the likelihood of receiving treatment from a mental health facility.
29536.zh_abstract: 有证据表明，医生不成比例地遭受物质使用障碍和心理健康问题。然而，尚不清楚这些现象是否具有因果性。我们利用荷兰医学院申请者的数据，研究成为医生对处方药使用以及接受心理健康机构治疗的影响。通过利用决定医学院录取的抽签结果带来的变异，我们发现成为医生会增加抗抑郁药、阿片类药物、抗焦虑药和镇静剂的使用，尤其是对女医生而言。在GPA分布底部的女性申请者中，成为医生会增加其接受心理健康机构治疗的可能性。

29534.title: The Impact of Health and Education on Labor Force Participation in Aging Societies – Projections for the United States and Germany from a Dynamic Microsimulation
29534.zh_title: 老龄化社会中健康与教育对劳动力参与的影响——基于美国与德国的动态微观模拟预测
29534.authors: René Böheim, Thomas Horvath, Thomas Leoni, Martin Spielauer
29534.abstract:
Using a highly stylized dynamic microsimulation model, we project the labor force of the United States up to the year 2060 and contrast these projections with projections for Germany to assess differential effects on outcomes The projections are consistent with the U S Census Bureau’s and Eurostat’s demographic projections. Our modeling approach allows to show and quantify how policy changes the future size of the labor force, which we assess with a series of what-if scenarios. 
Both the US and Germany are expected to undergo demographic aging, but their demographic fundamentals differ starkly. This has strong implications for their labor force developments. According to our microsimulation, the US labor force will, despite population aging, increase by 16.2 percent in the age groups 15 to 74 (corresponding to 25.2 million workers) between 2020 and 2060, while Germany will experience a decline by 10.7 percent (4.4 million workers). In these baseline projections, improvements in the education structure will add about two million persons to the US labor force and about half a million persons to the German labor force by 2060. 
In the what-if scenarios, we examine the implications of improvements in the educational structure of the population and of policies which address the health impediments for labor force participation. Of the educational scenarios that we evaluate, increasing the number of persons who achieve more than lower education has the strongest positive impact on labor force participation, relative to the number of additional years of schooling implied by the various scenarios. Shifting people from intermediate to higher education levels also increases labor force participation in higher age groups, however, this is partially offset by lock in effects at younger ages.
Our projections highlight that improvements in the labor market integration of people with health limitations provide a particularly promising avenue to increase labor force participation rates and thus help to address the challenges posed by demographic aging. If the health gap in participation rates in the United States were similar to that currently observed in Sweden, the labor force in 2060 would be larger by about 14.9 million persons.
29534.zh_abstract: 使用一个高度简化的动态微观模拟模型，我们预测了美国截至2060年的劳动力，并与德国的预测进行对比，以评估不同效应带来的结果。这些预测与美国人口普查局和欧盟统计局的人口预测一致。我们的建模方法能够展示并量化政策如何改变未来的劳动力规模，我们通过一系列假设情景对此进行评估。

29532.title: Private or Public Equity? The Evolving Entrepreneurial Finance Landscape
29532.zh_title: 私募还是公开股权？不断演变的创业融资格局
29532.abstract: The U.S. entrepreneurial finance market has changed dramatically over the last two decades. Entrepreneurs raising their first round of venture capital retain 30% more equity in their firm and are more likely to control their board of directors. Late-stage startups are raising larger amounts of capital in the private markets from a growing pool of traditional and new investors. These private market changes have coincided with a sharp decline in the number of firms going public—and when firms do go public, they are older and have raised more private capital. To understand these facts, we provide a systematic description of the differences between private and public firms. Next, we review several regulatory, technological, and competitive changes affecting both startups and investors that help explain how the trade-offs between going public and staying private have changed. We conclude by listing several open research questions.
29532.zh_abstract: 过去二十年，美国创业融资市场发生了巨大变化。筹集首轮风险资本的创业者在其公司中保留的股权增加了30%，并且更有可能控制其董事会。处于后期阶段的初创公司正从日益增多的传统和新投资者群体中，在私募市场筹集更大规模的资本。这些私募市场的变化恰逢上市公司数量急剧下降——而且当公司最终上市时，它们年龄更大，并已筹集了更多私募资本。为了理解这些事实，我们系统描述了私营公司与上市公司之间的差异。接着，我们回顾了影响初创公司和投资者的若干监管、技术和竞争变化，这些变化有助于解释上市与保持私营之间的权衡如何发生改变。最后，我们列出了几个待解决的研究问题。

29531.title: Fiscal Multipliers in the COVID19 Recession
29531.zh_title: 新冠疫情衰退中的财政乘数
29531.authors: Alan J. Auerbach, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Peter McCrory, Daniel Murphy
29531.abstract: In response to the record-breaking COVID19 recession, many governments have adopted unprecedented fiscal stimuli. While countercyclical fiscal policy is effective in fighting conventional recessions, little is known about the effectiveness of fiscal policy in the current environment with widespread shelter-in-place (“lockdown”) policies and the associated considerable limits on economic activity. Using detailed regional variation in economic conditions, lockdown policies, and U.S. government spending, we document that the effects of government spending were stronger during the peak of the pandemic recession, but only in cities that were not subject to strong stay-at-home orders. We examine mechanisms that can account for our evidence and place our findings in the context of other recent evidence from microdata.
29531.zh_abstract: 为应对创纪录的新冠疫情衰退，许多政府采取了前所未有的财政刺激措施。虽然反周期财政政策在应对常规衰退方面是有效的，但在当前普遍存在居家令（“封锁”）政策以及由此带来的经济活动显著受限的环境下，人们对财政政策的有效性知之甚少。利用经济状况、封锁政策以及美国政府支出在区域层面的详细差异，我们记录到政府支出的影响在疫情衰退高峰期更强，但仅限于那些未受严格居家令约束的城市。我们考察了能够解释我们证据的机制，并将我们的发现置于近期来自微观数据的其他证据背景下。

29530.title: Demand Estimation with Infrequent Purchases and Small Market Sizes
29530.zh_title: 低频购买与小市场规模下的需求估计
29530.authors: Ali Hortaçsu, Olivia R. Natan, Hayden Parsley, Timothy Schwieg, Kevin R. Williams
29530.abstract: We propose a demand estimation method that allows for a large number of zero sale observations, rich unobserved heterogeneity, and endogenous prices. We do so by modeling small market sizes through Poisson arrivals. Each of these arriving consumers solves a standard discrete choice problem. We present a Bayesian IV estimation approach that addresses sampling error in product shares and scales well to rich data environments. The data requirements are traditional market-level data as well as a measure of market sizes or consumer arrivals. After presenting simulation studies, we demonstrate the method in an empirical application of air travel demand.
29530.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种需求估计方法，该方法允许存在大量零销售观测值、丰富的未观测异质性以及内生价格。我们通过泊松到达过程来建模小市场规模。每个到达的消费者解决一个标准的离散选择问题。我们提出了一种贝叶斯工具变量估计方法，该方法能处理产品份额的抽样误差，并能很好地扩展到丰富的数据环境。所需的数据是传统的市场层面数据，以及市场规模或消费者到达量的度量。在展示模拟研究之后，我们在一项航空旅行需求的应用中演示了该方法。

29528.title: Causes and Consequences of Illicit Drug Epidemics
29528.zh_title: 非法药物流行的原因与后果
29528.authors: Timothy J. Moore, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula
29528.abstract: Large and rapid upswings in illicit drug use display similar properties to infectious disease epidemics. In this chapter, we review research to understand what causes drug epidemics and how they end. Drug market actors are subject to both positive and negative reinforcement that lead to rapid, nonlinear increases and decreases in drug market activity. There is evidence that drug epidemics cause serious problems, including drug overdoses, adverse birth outcomes, homicides, lower educational attainment, and migration from neighborhoods subject to intense drug market activity. Many of these costs are borne by those who do not consume or sell drugs. Given the frequency, size, and impacts of illicit drug epidemics, they deserve more attention by researchers and policy-makers.
29528.zh_abstract: 非法药物使用的大幅快速上升表现出与传染病流行相似的特征。在本章中，我们回顾了旨在理解药物流行成因及其如何结束的研究。药物市场参与者受到正强化和负强化的共同作用，导致药物市场活动出现快速、非线性的增加和减少。有证据表明，药物流行会导致严重问题，包括药物过量、不良出生结局、凶杀案、教育程度降低以及人们从药物市场活动密集的社区迁移。许多这些成本由不消费或贩卖药物的人承担。鉴于非法药物流行的频率、规模和影响，它们值得研究人员和政策制定者给予更多关注。
29528.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I12, I18, K42

29566.title: Randomization for Causality, Ethnography for Mechanisms: Illiquid Savings for Liquor in an Autarkic Society
29566.zh_title: 因果关系的随机化、机制的民族志：自给自足社会中为酒类而设的流动性储蓄
29566.authors: Ricardo Godoy, Dean Karlan, Jonathan Zinman
29566.abstract: What should researchers do when confronted with surprising results? Financial access innovations usually leave “temptation” spending unaffected or reduced. However, we found that promotion of savings lockboxes in a largely autarkic society increased alcohol consumption and blood pressure, despite no one reporting intentions to save for alcohol. To probe mechanisms that could explain this pattern, we then used ethnographic methods, including direct observations of drinking (“scans”) and debriefing interviews to discuss the earlier trial results. We learn that sponsoring drinks confers prestige, but the stigma attached to drinking by outsiders likely discouraged reporting intentions to save for it.
29566.zh_abstract: 当研究人员面对令人惊讶的结果时应该怎么做？金融可及性创新通常不会影响或会减少“诱惑性”支出。然而，我们发现，在一个基本自给自足的社会中推广储蓄保险箱增加了酒精消费和血压，尽管没有人报告有储蓄用于购买酒精的意图。为了探究可能解释这种模式的机制，我们随后使用了民族志方法，包括直接观察饮酒行为（“扫描”）和事后访谈以讨论早期的试验结果。我们了解到，请客喝酒能带来声望，但局外人对饮酒的污名化可能阻碍了人们报告储蓄用于饮酒的意图。
29566.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D12, I12, O15

29565.title: Job Training Through Turmoil
29565.authors: Felipe Barrera-Osorio, Adriana D. Kugler, Mikko I. Silliman
29565.abstract: We follow the labor market outcomes of applicants who were randomized into job training a year and a half before the pandemic through the subsequent economic turmoil that resulted from COVID-19. Despite persistently improved labor market outcomes of training participants prior to March 2020, we show that job losses resulting from the pandemic washed away all the benefits of the program. A year and a half after the initial scars of the pandemic, there are no visible signs of recovery of trainees’ labor market outcomes.
29565.zh_abstract: 我们追踪了在大流行前一年半被随机分配参加职业培训的申请人在随后由COVID-19引发的经济动荡中的劳动力市场结果。尽管在2020年3月之前，培训参与者的劳动力市场结果持续改善，但我们表明，大流行导致的失业抹去了该项目的所有收益。在大流行最初冲击发生一年半后，受训者劳动力市场结果没有明显的复苏迹象。

29563.title: COVID-19 Vaccination Mandates and Vaccine Uptake
29563.zh_title: COVID-19疫苗接种强制令与疫苗接种率
29563.authors: Alexander Karaivanov, Dongwoo Kim, Shih En Lu, Hitoshi Shigeoka
29563.abstract: We evaluate the impact of government mandated proof of vaccination requirements for access to public venues and non-essential businesses on COVID-19 vaccine uptake. We find that the announcement of a mandate is associated with a rapid and significant surge in new vaccinations (more than 60\\% increase in weekly first doses) using the variation in the timing of these measures across Canadian provinces in a difference-in-differences approach. Time-series analysis for each province and for France, Italy and Germany corroborates this finding, and we estimate cumulative gains of up to 5 percentage points in provincial vaccination rates and 790,000 or more first doses for Canada as a whole as of October 31, 2021 (5 to 13 weeks after the provincial mandate announcements). We also find large vaccination gains in France (3 to 5 mln first doses), Italy (around 6 mln) and Germany (around 3.5 mln) 11 to 16 weeks after the proof of vaccination mandate announcements.
29563.zh_abstract: 我们评估了政府要求提供疫苗接种证明才能进入公共场所和非必要企业的强制令对COVID-19疫苗接种率的影响。利用加拿大各省实施这些措施的时间差异，采用双重差分法，我们发现强制令的宣布与新疫苗接种的快速显著激增相关（每周首剂接种量增加超过60%）。对每个省份以及法国、意大利和德国的时间序列分析证实了这一发现，我们估计截至2021年10月31日（各省强制令宣布后5至13周），省级疫苗接种率累计提高了高达5个百分点，加拿大全国首剂接种量增加了79万剂或更多。我们还在法国（300万至500万首剂）、意大利（约600万）和德国（约350万）发现了疫苗接种证明强制令宣布后11至16周内疫苗接种量的大幅增加。
29563.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C23, I12, I18

29562.title: The US-China Trade War and Global Reallocations
29562.zh_title: 中美贸易战与全球重新配置
29562.authors: Pablo Fajgelbaum, Pinelopi K. Goldberg, Patrick J. Kennedy, Amit Khandelwal, Daria Taglioni
29562.abstract: The US-China trade war created net export opportunities rather than simply shifting trade across destinations. Many “bystander” countries grew their exports of taxed products into the rest of the world (excluding US and China). Country-specific components of tariff elasticities, rather than specialization patterns, drove large cross-country variation in export growth of tariff-exposed products. The elasticities of exports to US-China tariffs identify whether a country’s exports complement or substitute US or China and its supply curve’s slope. Countries that operate along downward-sloping supplies whose exports substitute (complement) US and China are among the larger (smaller) beneficiaries of the trade war.
29562.zh_abstract: 中美贸易战创造了净出口机会，而不仅仅是跨目的地的贸易转移。许多“旁观”国家增加了对世界其他地区（不包括美国和中国）的受关税影响产品的出口。关税弹性的国家特定成分，而非专业化模式，导致了受关税影响产品出口增长的巨大跨国差异。出口对中美关税的弹性识别了一个国家的出口是补充还是替代美国或中国，以及其供给曲线的斜率。那些沿着向下倾斜的供给曲线运营、其出口替代（补充）美国和中国的国家，是贸易战中较大（较小）的受益者。

29560.title: Let the Worst One Fail: A Credible Solution to the Too-Big-To-Fail Conundrum
29560.zh_title: 让最差的那个失败：对“大而不能倒”困境的一个可信解决方案
29560.abstract: We study time-consistent bank resolution mechanisms. When interventions are ex post efficient, a government cannot commit not to inject capital into the banking system. Contrary to common wisdom, we show that the government may still avoid moral hazard and implement the first best allocation by using the distribution of bailouts across banks to provide ex ante incentives. In particular, we analyze properties of credible tournament mechanisms that provide support to the best performing banks and resolve the worst performing ones, including through mergers. Our mechanism continues to perform well if banks are partially substitutable, and if they are heterogeneous in their size, interconnections, and thus systemic risk, as long as bailout funds can be targeted to particular banks.
29560.zh_abstract: 我们研究了时间一致的银行处置机制。当干预是事后有效时，政府无法承诺不向银行体系注入资本。与普遍看法相反，我们表明政府仍可能通过利用银行间救助分配的分布来提供事前激励，从而避免道德风险并实现最优配置。具体而言，我们分析了可信的锦标赛机制的特性，该机制为表现最佳的银行提供支持，并处置表现最差的银行，包括通过合并。如果银行是部分可替代的，并且如果它们在规模、互联性和由此产生的系统性风险方面存在异质性，只要救助资金可以针对特定银行，我们的机制仍能表现良好。
29560.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：G01, G2, G33, G34, G38, H12

29559.title: Simple Allocation Rules and Optimal Portfolio Choice Over the Lifecycle
29559.zh_title: 简单配置规则与生命周期中的最优投资组合选择
29559.authors: Victor Duarte, Julia Fonseca, Aaron S. Goodman, Jonathan A. Parker
29559.abstract: We develop a machine-learning solution algorithm to solve for optimal portfolio choice in a lifecycle model that includes many features of reality modelled only separately in previous work. We use the quantitative model to evaluate the consumption-equivalent welfare losses from using simple rules for portfolio allocation across stocks, bonds, and liquid accounts instead of the optimal portfolio choices, both for optimizing households and for households that undersave. We find that the consumption-equivalent losses from using an age-dependent rule as embedded in current target-date/lifecycle funds (TDFs) are substantial, around 2 to 3 percent of consumption, despite the fact that TDF rules mimic average optimal behavior by age closely until shortly before retirement. Optimal equity shares have substantial heterogeneity, particularly by wealth level, state of the business cycle, and dividend-price ratio, implying substantial gains to further customization of advice or TDFs in these dimensions.
29559.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种机器学习求解算法，用于在生命周期模型中求解最优投资组合选择，该模型包含了以往研究中仅单独建模的许多现实特征。我们利用该定量模型评估了使用股票、债券和活期账户的简单投资组合配置规则（而非最优投资组合选择）所带来的消费等价福利损失，既针对优化型家庭，也针对储蓄不足的家庭。我们发现，使用当前目标日期/生命周期基金（TDF）中嵌入的年龄依赖规则所带来的消费等价损失是显著的，约为消费的2%至3%，尽管TDF规则在退休前不久才密切模仿了按年龄划分的平均最优行为。最优股权配置比例存在显著的异质性，特别是按财富水平、商业周期状态和股息价格比划分，这表明在这些维度上进一步定制建议或TDF具有显著收益。
29559.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, TWP；JEL：C61, D15, E21, G11, G51

29554.title: Empirical Option Pricing Models
29554.abstract: This paper is an overview of empirical options research, with primary emphasis on research into systematic stochastic volatility and jump risks relevant for pricing stock index options. The paper reviews evidence from time series analysis, option prices and option price evolution regarding those risks, and discusses required compensation.
29554.zh_abstract: 本文是对实证期权研究的概述，主要侧重于与股票指数期权定价相关的系统性随机波动率和跳跃风险的研究。本文回顾了来自时间序列分析、期权价格和期权价格演变关于这些风险的证据，并讨论了所需的补偿。

29551.title: Has Global Agricultural Trade Been Resilient Under Covid-19? Findings from an Econometric Assessment of 2020
29551.zh_title: COVID-19下全球农产品贸易是否具有韧性？基于2020年计量经济学评估的发现
29551.authors: Shawn Arita, Jason Grant, Sharon S. Sydow, Jayson Beckman
29551.abstract: Global agricultural trade, which increased at the end of 2020, has been described as “resilient” to the impacts of the COVID-19 coronavirus pandemic; however, the size and channels of its quantitative impacts are not clear. Using a reduced-form, gravity-based econometric model for monthly trade, we estimate the effects of COVID-19 incidence rates, policy restrictions imposed by governments to curb the outbreak, and the de facto reduction in human mobility/lockdown effect on global agricultural trade through the end of 2020. We find that while agricultural trade remained quite stable through the pandemic, the sector as a whole did not go unscathed. First, we estimate that COVID-19 reduced agricultural trade by the approximate range of 5 to 10 percent at the aggregate sector level; a quantified impact two to three times smaller in magnitude than our estimated impact on trade occurring in the non-agricultural sector. Second, we find sharp differences across individual commodities. In particular, we find that non-food items (hides and skins, ethanol, cotton, and other commodities), meat products including seafood, and higher value agri-food products were most severely impacted by the pandemic; however, the COVID- 19 trade effect for the majority of food and bulk agricultural commodity sectors were found to be insignificant, or in a few cases, positive. Finally, we also examine the effects across low vs high income countries, the changing dynamics of the pandemic’s effect on trade flows, and the effects along the extensive product margins of trade.
29551.zh_abstract: 全球农产品贸易在2020年底有所增长，被描述为对COVID-19冠状病毒大流行的影响具有“韧性”；然而，其定量影响的大小和渠道尚不清楚。利用月度贸易的简化形式、基于引力模型的计量经济学模型，我们估计了截至2020年底，COVID-19发病率、政府为遏制疫情而实施的政策限制以及实际人员流动减少/封锁效应对全球农产品贸易的影响。我们发现，虽然农产品贸易在整个大流行期间保持相当稳定，但该行业整体并非毫发无损。首先，我们估计COVID-19在总体行业层面使农产品贸易减少了大约5%至10%的范围；这一量化影响比我们估计的对非农业部门贸易的影响小两到三倍。其次，我们发现不同商品之间存在显著差异。特别是，我们发现非食品项目（生皮和毛皮、乙醇、棉花和其他商品）、包括海鲜在内的肉类产品以及高价值农产品食品受到大流行的影响最为严重；然而，对于大多数食品和大宗农产品部门，COVID-19的贸易效应被发现是不显著的，或者在少数情况下是正的。最后，我们还考察了低收入与高收入国家之间的效应、大流行对贸易流影响的动态变化，以及沿贸易广泛产品边际的效应。

29572.title: Identifying Monetary Policy Shocks Using the Central Bank's Information Set
29572.zh_title: 利用中央银行信息集识别货币政策冲击
29572.authors: Ruediger Bachmann, Isabel Gödl-Hanisch, Eric R. Sims
29572.abstract: We identify monetary policy shocks by exploiting variation in the central bank’s information set. To be specific, we use differences between nowcasts of the output gap and inflation with final, revised estimates of these series to isolate movements in the policy rate unrelated to economic conditions. We then compute the effects of a monetary policy shock on the aggregate economy using local projection methods. We find that a contractionary monetary policy shock has a limited negative effect on output but a persistent negative impact on prices. In contrast to alternative identification approaches, we do not observe a price puzzle when analyzing the period from 1987 to 2008. Further, we validate the identification approach in a simple New Keynesian model, augmented by the assumption that the central bank observes the ingredients of the Taylor rule with error.
29572.zh_abstract: 我们通过利用中央银行信息集的差异来识别货币政策冲击。具体而言，我们使用产出缺口和通胀的即时预测与最终修订估计值之间的差异，来分离与经济状况无关的政策利率变动。然后，我们使用局部投影方法计算货币政策冲击对总体经济的影响。我们发现，紧缩性货币政策冲击对产出有有限的负面影响，但对价格有持续的负面影响。与替代识别方法相比，在分析1987年至2008年期间时，我们没有观察到价格之谜。此外，我们在一个简单的新凯恩斯模型中验证了该识别方法，该模型假设中央银行在观察泰勒规则各组成部分时存在误差。

29571.title: Time Use and Gender in Africa in Times of Structural Transformation
29571.zh_title: 结构转型时期非洲的时间利用与性别
29571.abstract: Many African countries are still in the early stages of structural transformation. Typically, as economies move through the structural transformation, activities once conducted within the household are outsourced to the market. This has particular implications for women’s time use. In this paper, we document that current patterns of female time use in home production in several African countries closely resemble historical time use patterns in the US. We highlight two stylized facts about women’s time use in Africa. First, in North Africa, women spend very few hours in market work and female labor force participation overall is extremely low. Second, although extensive margin participation of women is high in sub-Saharan Africa, women tend to work in the market for only a few hours each week, with the rest of their work hours spent in home production. These two facts suggest two types of constraints that could slow down the reallocation of female time from home to market as economies grow: Social norms related to women’s market work, and a lack of infrastructure (e.g. household infrastructure and childcare facilities) to facilitate marketizing home production. We discuss recent empirical evidence related to each set of constraints and highlight new avenues for research.
29571.zh_abstract: 许多非洲国家仍处于结构转型的早期阶段。通常，随着经济体经历结构转型，曾经在家庭内部进行的活动会被外包给市场。这对女性的时间利用具有特殊影响。在本文中，我们记录了几个非洲国家当前女性在家务生产中的时间利用模式，这些模式与历史上美国的时间利用模式非常相似。我们强调关于非洲女性时间利用的两个典型事实。首先，在北非，女性在市场工作中花费的时间非常少，总体女性劳动力参与率极低。其次，尽管在撒哈拉以南非洲，女性的广泛边际参与率很高，但女性每周仅在市场工作几个小时，其余工作时间用于家务生产。这两个事实表明，随着经济增长，可能有两类约束会减缓女性时间从家庭向市场的重新配置：与女性市场工作相关的社会规范，以及缺乏促进家务生产市场化的基础设施（例如家庭基础设施和儿童保育设施）。我们讨论了与每类约束相关的最新实证证据，并强调了新的研究方向。

29570.title: Labor Productivity Growth and Industrialization in Africa
29570.zh_title: 非洲的劳动生产率增长与工业化
29570.abstract: Manufacturing has made an important contribution to raising living standards in many parts of the world. Concerns about premature deindustrialization have made some observers skeptical about the potential for manufacturing to play this role in Africa. But employment in African manufacturing has grown rapidly over the past 20 years. These employment gains have been accompanied by: (i) large increases in the number of small manufacturing firms; (ii) limited employment gains in large firms; and (iii) robust labor productivity growth in Africa’s large firms. Limited employment growth in Africa’s large manufacturing firms is partly a result of the capital intensity of the manufacturing sub-sectors in which African countries are most engaged – the processing of resources, and partly a result of rising capital intensity in manufacturing. The potential for manufacturing to raise living standards in Africa depends on indirect job creation by large firms through backward and forward linkages and increasing labor productivity in small firms.
29570.zh_abstract: 制造业为提高世界许多地区的生活水平做出了重要贡献。对过早去工业化的担忧使一些观察者对制造业在非洲发挥这一作用的潜力持怀疑态度。但过去20年间，非洲制造业的就业增长迅速。这些就业增长伴随着：（i）小型制造企业数量大幅增加；（ii）大型企业就业增长有限；（iii）非洲大型企业劳动生产率强劲增长。非洲大型制造企业就业增长有限，部分原因是非洲国家最常涉足的制造业子行业（资源加工）的资本密集度，部分原因是制造业资本密集度的上升。制造业提高非洲生活水平的潜力，取决于大型企业通过前向和后向联系间接创造就业，以及提高小型企业的劳动生产率。
29570.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI；JEL：L16, L25, L6, O14, O55

29596.title: Behavioral Responses to Supply-Side Drug Policy During the Opioid Epidemic
29596.zh_title: 阿片类药物流行期间供给侧药物政策的行为反应
29596.authors: Simone Balestra, Helge Liebert, Nicole Maestas, Tisamarie B. Sherry
29596.abstract: We investigate behavioral responses to a staggered disruption in the supply of prescription opioids across U.S. states: the introduction of electronic Prescription Drug Monitoring Programs (PDMPs). Using administrative datasets, we find PDMPs curtail the proliferation of prescription opioids. Physicians respond to monitoring on the extensive margin, limiting the number of patients to whom they prescribe opioids without adjusting dosage or duration. This decreases supply to long-term opioid users, who evade the restrictions by acquiring prescriptions from out-of-state prescribers and by substituting to heroin. This causes a surge in heroin overdoses, which offsets reductions in hospitalizations and deaths from prescription opioids.
29596.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国各州处方阿片类药物供应交错中断（即引入电子处方药监测计划）所引发的行为反应。利用行政数据集，我们发现电子处方药监测计划遏制了处方阿片类药物的扩散。医生在广泛边际上对监测做出反应，限制了开具阿片类药物处方的患者数量，而未调整剂量或用药时长。这减少了对长期阿片类药物使用者的供应，他们通过从州外处方者获取处方以及转向使用海洛因来规避限制。这导致海洛因过量使用激增，抵消了处方阿片类药物所致住院和死亡的减少。

29591.title: Do Well Managed Firms Make Better Forecasts?
29591.zh_title: 管理良好的公司能做出更好的预测吗？
29591.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Takafumi Kawakubo, Charlotte Meng, Paul Mizen, Rebecca Riley, Tatsuro Senga, John Van Reenen
29591.abstract: We link a new UK management survey covering 8,000 firms to panel data on productivity in manufacturing and services. There is a large variation in management practices, which are highly correlated with productivity, profitability and size. Uniquely, the survey collects firms’ micro forecasts of their own sales and also macro forecasts of GDP. We find that better managed firms make more accurate micro and macro forecasts, even after controlling for their size, age, industry and many other factors. We also show better managed firms appear aware that their forecasts are more accurate, with lower subjective uncertainty around central values. These stylized facts suggest that one reason for the superior performance of better managed firms is that they knowingly make more accurate forecasts, enabling them to make superior operational and strategic choices.
29591.zh_abstract: 我们将一项涵盖8000家英国公司的新管理调查与制造业和服务业的生产率面板数据联系起来。管理实践存在巨大差异，且与生产率、盈利能力和规模高度相关。独特的是，该调查收集了公司对其自身销售额的微观预测以及对国内生产总值的宏观预测。我们发现，管理更好的公司能做出更准确的微观和宏观预测，即使在控制了公司规模、年龄、行业和许多其他因素之后也是如此。我们还表明，管理更好的公司似乎意识到其预测更准确，对中心值的主观不确定性更低。这些典型事实表明，管理更好的公司业绩更优的一个原因是，它们有意识地做出更准确的预测，从而能够做出更优的运营和战略选择。
